---
pagetitle: "Theodor Balan"
---

<main>

::: {.wrap}

::: {.hero}

::: {.avatar}
![avatar](/images/avatar.jpg)
:::

::: {.hero-text}
# Theodor Balan, PhD

[Data Scientist &nbsp;|&nbsp; Statistician &nbsp;|&nbsp; R programmer]{.tagline}

::: {.links-row}
[Email](mailto:hello@tbalan.com) [GitHub](https://github.com/tbalan/) [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/thbalan/) [Medium](https://medium.com/@thbalan) [Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-v5tVyUAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::
:::

:::

::: {.status-line}
::: {.status-dot}
:::
Currently @ [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com)
:::

:::

</main>
